steps.title: Use the financial clue
steps.content: Delaying government transfers would make working adults support nonworking parents for longer. That extra financial obligation would make wealth creation harder, so the blank needs a negative word.

steps.title: Choose the hindering word
steps.content: "Stymie" means hinder or block, which fits the effect on wealth creation. B means intensify, C means criticize, and D means exceed; none matches the idea of making wealth creation more difficult. The answer is A.
